summary: Card created for generation queue/cue/stop/dual-engine refactor; investigation in progress (4 agents).

Investigation complete (4 agents, research/ x4). Large adaptive plan attached: generationStore state machine, cancellation tokens, SSE engine tagging/merge, derived UI, reconcile-on-truth. Foundation parallel batch + phases 2-5.
todo -> doing: picking up Foundation batch (B1-A/B/C) via mpi-execute-parallel.

B1-C engineOverride + R31 selector live-proven: local(10 models) vs remote(2) via /check-local routing. R31 needed cross-fence modelRegistry.js+shell.js edits (done post-MPI-209 commit). Probes reverted, lint clean, uncommitted. Phases 2-5 remain (store not yet in live gen path).

Phase 2 COMPLETE (auto-verified). commandExecutor.js reworked onto generationStore: job registered at engine+arch freeze; _abortedBail after every await boundary (no /prompt POST on Stop-before-dispatch, disease 3); _modelInitializing closure replaced by store phase (loading/sampling helpers, prompt_ack->accepted, finish->settle done, catch->settle error); SSE listeners engine-filtered via _frameEngineMatches (disease 2); exec.cancel()->store.cancel(jobId) with frozen interruptCb. +1 events.js JSDoc line, +T14 store test. 14/14 store + 14/14 resolver green; parses clean. Uncommitted. Live Stop-during-LOADING check deferred to user. Phases 3-5 remain.

Phase 2 LIVE-VERIFIED by user: local gen Stop DURING LOADING MODEL stopped cleanly (disease-3 orphan-prompt fix works end-to-end). Auto also green (14/14 store incl T14, resolver suite, parse).
